content:
The Knights of the Round Table are legendary figures associated with King Arthur. While different stories list different knights, some of the most commonly named include:

- Sir Lancelot
- Sir Gawain
- Sir Galahad
- Sir Percival
- Sir Bors
- Sir Kay
- Sir Tristan
- Sir Bedivere
- Sir Geraint
- Sir Gareth

These names appear in various Arthurian legends and medieval romances.
